issues.evidence: Sampled live pages had no forbidden phrases from the Phase 5B forbidden list.

app/(localized)/[locale]/career/jobs/[slug]/page.tsx uses bounded copy such as Strong recommendation is not open yet; app/(localized)/[locale]/career/recommendations/mbti/[type]/page.tsx uses recommendation copy that must remain MBTI snapshot/next_step_only.
Live API actors titles.search_h1_zh contains 演员职业诊断. This was observed in API payload and should be manually reviewed against the manual decision to avoid public primary diagnostic phrasing.
Occupation JSON-LD appears on computer-programmers but not on several display-asset pages; claim hardening should define which pages can expose Occupation JSON-LD and under which evidence conditions.

Recommendation detail source contains labels such as Your career direction recommendation and Personalized recommendation status; no live lowercase infj page exposure was observed, but copy should remain snapshot-bounded if route becomes public.

patchPlan: No public copy patch in Phase 5B.
Before Phase 5C, create a scoped claim-hardening PR only if humans approve exact wording changes.
Keep RIASEC and Big Five from recommender positioning.
Keep MBTI recommendation language bounded as snapshot direction support.
